display.purpose: Page titles and major section headers. Rarely used.

body.purpose: Default reading size for all body copy, descriptions, and form labels.

label.purpose: Navigation groups, badges, chips, and UI chrome that needs to recede.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default easing for state transitions (hover, focus, active).

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Default action button. Vault Black fill, sharp corners, compact height.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 32px; padding: 0 10px; background: var(--primary); color: var(--primary-foreground); font-family: 'Geist Variable', sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; border: none; border-radius: 0; white-space: nowrap; transition: background 0.15s ease; outline: none; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: color-mix(in oklch, var(--primary) 80%, transparent); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { border: 1px solid var(--ring); box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px color-mix(in oklch, var(--ring) 50%, transparent); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: translateY(1px); }

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: Secondary action. Transparent background with hairline border.
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 32px; padding: 0 10px; background: var(--background); color: var(--foreground); font-family: 'Geist Variable', sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 0; white-space: nowrap; transition: background 0.15s ease; outline: none; } .ds-btn-outline:hover { background: var(--muted); } .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { border-color: var(--ring); box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px color-mix(in oklch, var(--ring) 50%, transparent); } .ds-btn-outline:active { transform: translateY(1px); }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Single-line text field. Transparent background, sharp corners, ring focus.
components.css: .ds-input { width: 100%; height: 32px; padding: 0 10px; background: transparent; color: var(--foreground); font-family: 'Geist Variable', sans-serif; font-size: 12px; border: 1px solid var(--input); border-radius: 0; outline: none; transition: border-color 0.15s ease; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: var(--muted-foreground); } .ds-input:focus-visible { border-color: var(--ring); box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px color-mix(in oklch, var(--ring) 50%, transparent); } .ds-input:disabled { background: color-mix(in oklch, var(--input) 50%, transparent); opacity: 0.5; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Card
components.description: Content container. Sharp corners, ring border, no shadow.
components.html:
Card Title
Card content goes here.
components.css: .ds-card { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 16px; padding: 16px; background: var(--card); color: var(--card-foreground); font-family: 'Geist Variable', sans-serif; font-size: 12px; line-height: 1.5; border-radius: 0; box-shadow: none; ring: 1px solid color-mix(in oklch, var(--foreground) 10%, transparent); } .ds-card-header { display: grid; gap: 4px; padding: 0; } .ds-card-title { font-family: 'Geist Variable', sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.25; } .ds-card-content { padding: 0; }

components.name: Sidebar Nav Item
components.description: Navigation item in the collapsible sidebar. Icon + label, muted hover, no accent active state.
components.html: Dashboard
components.css: .ds-nav-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; height: 36px; padding: 0 10px; color: var(--sidebar-foreground); font-family: 'Geist Variable', sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 400; text-decoration: none; border-radius: 0; transition: background 0.15s ease; } .ds-nav-item:hover { background: var(--muted); } .ds-nav-item:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 1px var(--ring); } .ds-nav-icon { width: 16px; height: 16px; flex-shrink: 0; }

components.name: Badge
components.description: Compact status label. Muted background, sharp corners.
components.css: .ds-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 20px; padding: 0 8px; background: var(--muted); color: var(--foreground); font-family: 'Geist Variable', sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; border-radius: 0; white-space: nowrap; }

narrative.overview: Bakarr is a secure, precise archive. Every element sits exactly where it belongs, with sharp edges and neutral tones. The anime artwork is the only color in the room. The interface does not compete for attention; it frames the content with clinical confidence. The system rejects clutter, decoration, and warmth that does not serve a functional purpose.
keyCharacteristics: Sharp geometry — zero border radius on all surfaces.
Neutral purity — chroma near zero everywhere.
Tactile feedback — immediate physical state changes on interaction.
Flat depth — elevation via tonal shifts and 1px rings, never shadows.
Compact scale — default type size is 12px.

rules.name: The Zero Chroma Rule
rules.body: Every neutral token must have chroma ≤ 0.01. If a color looks tinted, it is wrong.

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: Alert Red is the only saturated color in the system. Its rarity is the point. Never introduce a second accent hue.

rules.name: The Small-By-Default Rule
rules.body: The default font size across the application is 12px (text-xs). Larger sizes must be justified by hierarchy, not habit.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. The only permitted depth cue is a 1px ring border or a background tone shift.

dos: Do use ring-1 ring-foreground/10 to define card and popover edges.
Do keep all corners sharp (rounded-none) on every component.
Do use Alert Red exclusively for errors and destructive actions.
Do let anime artwork be the only source of color and warmth on any screen.
Do use Geist Mono for technical data.
donts: Don't use rounded corners on any UI element.
Don't introduce a second accent color.
Don't create clutter or decoration that competes with anime artwork.
Don't use generic SaaS dashboard templates.
Don't use side-stripe borders as colored accents.
